════════════════════════════════════════════════

1. Brave Search API key — needed for research/signal agents
   Sign up: https://api.search.brave.com
   (Free tier available — takes 2 mins)

2. Cloudflare re-auth for missioncontrol.nthlayer.co.uk
   Run in WSL: /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/cloudflared tunnel login
   Then authorise nthlayer.co.uk in the browser popup

3. WSL shutdown — run once in Windows PowerShell:
   wsl --shutdown
   (Fixes LinkedIn automation — 10 seconds, huge unlock)

4. Google Drive API — enable at:
   https://console.developers.google.com (project ef901e5d)

5. Podcast list — share URLs/show names for the transcription agent

════════════════════════════════════════════════

1. LinkedIn browser automation
   Cause: WSL mirrored networking breaks CDP port forwarding
   Fix: Run wsl --shutdown in Windows PowerShell, restart OpenClaw
   Impact: Blocks Sonesse lead gen + Nth Layer ICP prospecting

2. Dashboard public URL (missioncontrol.nthlayer.co.uk)
   Cause: cloudflared cert expired during domain migration
   Fix: cloudflared tunnel login (WSL) and authorise nthlayer.co.uk
   Impact: Dashboard only accessible locally

3. Brave Search / Signal agents
   Cause: No API key
   Fix: 2-minute signup at api.search.brave.com (free tier)
   Impact: Blocks community monitoring, news-based prospect triggers

4. Google Drive integration
   Cause: Drive API not yet enabled in GCP console
   Fix: Enable at console.developers.google.com
   Impact: Blocks Drive file reading/writing via GoG
